title: Flushed into an Alternate World
overview: Yuri Shibuya was just a normal Japanese high school kid on his way home from school he sees a former classmate of his, Murata, being bullied. He steps in to try and stop the bullies but they just grab him instead and dunk his head in a toilet in the girls' bathroom.

title: Duel! Pretty Boy vs. Baseball Boy
overview: While attending a dinner party that the former Queen is holding, Wolfram insults Yuri's mother by saying she is dirty human and Yuri reacts to the insult by slapping Wolfram across the left cheek.

title: Yuri Shibuya! I Am the Demon King!
overview: When Yuri wakes up after his first time using magic he finds out from Wolfram that Conrad and Gwendal have gone off to protect a human refugee village that is being attacked.

title: What's Next? The Ultimate Weapon?!
overview: Yuri awakens to finds himself in the girls' bathroom he originally disappeared from with Ken Murata in front of him with a police officer.

title: Sailors and a Spoiled Brat
overview: Yuri, Conrad, and Wolfram set sail on a ship to Van da Via island where the demon sword, Morgif, is rumored to be located.

title: The Terror of Morgif, a Man-Eating Demon Sword
overview: Conrad, Wolfram, Yuri, and Jozak reach the Van da Via island.

title: Runaway? Stray? Demon Sword in Motion!
overview: With Morgif now in his possession, Yuri finds out that the sword needs to absorb souls for energy.

title: Moonlit Plot
overview: While Yuri is on Earth, Stoffel is in the other world hatching a plan.

title: Stolen Treasure
overview: In the morning, nothing appears to have happened. However one of the soldiers found the door to the treasure room was picked.

title: The Hand of Evil Looms Closer!
overview: As Yuri, Wolfram, and Conrad leave the castle to some soldiers, Stoffel and Raven start their next move.

title: The War Begins in the Alternate World
overview: Yuri wakes to find himself in Stoffel's castle. Stoffel tries to persuade Yuri to join his side, but Yuri rejects.

title: Chains of Love and Destiny
overview: Yuri goes to see a dolphin show, but when he is called up to the stage to shake hands with a dolphin he is then transported to the other world.

title: The Bride, Yuri and Gwendal
overview: Gwendal and Yuri enter the capital city of Svelera.

title: Yuri Does Heavy Labor
overview: Gwendal and Yuri are sent to trial for Yuri eloping with a demon.

title: Rainfall in the Desert
overview: After Yuri wakes up, he finds Norica digging through the cemetery looking for her son.

title: The Demon King Case File!
overview: After Yuri studies and practices baseball with Conrad, the news of a demon stone being stolen perks Yuri's interest.

title: I Am Remarrying
overview: Stoffel and Raven attempt to appease Yuri by arraigning a celebration for him.

title: In the Name of Love
overview: Yuri and Wolfram enter the guesthouse to get rid of some monsters.

title: Hero vs. Demon King (1)
overview: A fantasy world calls for a fantasy adventure, and Yuri has decided that he wants to see a dragon.

title: Hero vs. Demon King (2)
overview: Alford learns what it truly means to be a Hero. Yuri and the others find the dragons a new nest to help shield them from possible future poachers.

title: The Dangerous Visitor
overview: A young girl shows up claiming to be Yuri's illegitimate child, and then tries to kill Yuri.

title: Man of Destiny
overview: Greta spotted a man in town that she wanted to see again. Despite the fact that Conrad had told them to stay put, and still suffering from a twisted ankle, Yuri takes Greta into town.

title: Race of Flame
overview: The masked man turns out to be Hube, who now lays dying with Greta clinging to him. She tells the others that in her old home, Hube, who was in the dungeon, was the only one who would talk or listen to her.

title: Unforgiven
overview: Hube is returned to the Demon Kingdom and it seems that no one likes him. Greta tells Yuri that Hube had once told her that he'd done something unforgivable.

title: The Past and Future
overview: Hube once again attacks Yuri and Conrad defends him. Gwendal decides that Hube must die for his crimes.

title: The Full Circle of Life
overview: Conrad thinks about how life seems to continue on, though more slowly, when Yuri is not around.

title: Conrad's Arm
overview: Yuri is suddenly pulled back to the other world but instead of ending up in a water source as usual he ends up in a barrel of alcohol.

title: Atrocious Reunion
overview: Yuri soon learns that for the first time he is not alone. Somehow Murata has also ended up in the other world with him.

title: Chilling Overture
overview: Yuri, Murata and Lady Flynn are on a ship carrying cargo, passengers and prisoners. They're heading towards Big Shimaron when it is attacked by Small Shimaron.

title: The Forbidden Box
overview: Yuri learns of the Four Forbidden boxes that will bring destruction. Murata seems to know a lot more about this world than he should, raising questions as to his true identity.

title: The Ends of the Earth
overview: It seems Murata may be someone of importance. We learn that Conrad's arm may be the key to releasing the power of the box.

title: The Locked Memory
overview: Ken Murata is something more than simply Yuri's friend; he also holds a high place in the Demon society.

title: Run for It! The Snow Sled Race
overview: Every four years the Ultimate Tournament is held and Yuri enters on Caloria's behalf.

title: Hot Battle Coliseum?!
overview: The Ultimate tournament begins with Wolfram taking the first fighting position. After his battle Jozak battles with Adalbert who has entered this tournament solely for a chance to fight with Yuri.

title: Snow-Covered Earth
overview: Yuri is about to begin his battle, fortunately Lady Flynn is safe and he can fight the next opponent with all his might.

title: Farewell, Conrad
overview: King Belar declares that Big Shimaron is the winner of this year's Ultimate Tournament and orders Caloria's representatives to be arrested.

title: Whereabouts of the Boxes
overview: The episode starts with Conrad's dream, where someone appears to him an arm. Yuri is back on Earth depressed thinking about Conrad. Then later meets Murata at the park.

title: Günter vs. Conrad
overview: Yuri and his group travel to Cavalcade and meet Mr. Heathcrife who can help them get into a secluded land called Francia.

title: Your Name Is Demon King
overview: Lyla, the king's helper, takes it upon herself to show Yuri and the others around and to help them look for the forbidden box.

title: For Our Bonds
overview: Big Cimaron has taken control of Francia making escape hard for Yuri and the others.

title: Conrad's Return
overview: Francia has made Conrad a prisoner and decided to join in alliance with the Demon Kingdom.

title: A Distant Promise
overview: Yuri's older brother Shori reminisces about a time in Yuri's youth when he would call him his "big brother."

title: Baby Panic at Covenant Castle!
overview: Baby Ernst, Eru for short, the son of Hube, and several other noble born children are gathered at Covenant Castle for the "Great Birth Ceremony."

title: The Phantom Girl
overview: A mysterious girl who bears a strong resemblance to Ulrike is seen being mischievous around town.

title: The Betrothed vs. the Fiancé!
overview: Stoffel has plans to set up Yuri with an appropriate princess thereby cementing his ties with the current ruler of the kingdom.

title: The Priestess in the Forest
overview: Yuri and co. have gone through lots of boxes in order to find the last box but coming up empty. They learn of a box in a lake and go to investigate.

title: Proof of Life
overview: Dunheely, Conrad's father, has trouble getting along with Gwendal especially when Gwendal despises him. When Dunheely has Gwendal join him in helping a secluded town of outcasts Gwendal must learn to see his step-father as the person he truly is.

title: Big Cimaron Strikes Back!
overview: After having their box stolen by the Maou, Big Cimaron finds a new way to impose power over the allied countries: an "overseas study exchange."

title: The Lion and the Wolf
overview: Adalbert has taken King Yuri hostage and demands to know if Yuri does in fact have Julia's soul.

title: My Beloved Julia
overview: Panic consumes the troops of both nations and Big Shimaron's king decides to leave the children he already has in order to escape the volcano's fury.

title: Revenge Fiend? Maxine
overview: Maxine still has not given up hope of returning to his country and becoming wealthy and powerful. When he kidnaps Yuri and tries to escape he runs into one of Yuri's devoted subjects and is forced to abandon his plan.

title: Conrad Standing Tall
overview: When Yuri stumbles upon the "Demon Mirror" he's transported back to the time when Lady Celi ruled with the help of Stoffel. Yuri winds up meeting Lady Julia and comes to understand why she was loved by so many people.

title: Dear King Yuri
overview: Günter sets off on a "Nation Wide Tour" in order to better understand the "Common People." He comes to a town modeled after the old west and discovers that the town is full of fear and that only one person holding it together is a girl by the name of Gloria.

title: The Holy Sword and the Demon Sword (1)
overview: A man cloaked in shadows shows up wielding the power of the holy sword.

title: The Holy Sword and the Demon Sword (2)
overview: Yuri and the others go to check out the rumors about the Holy Sword and stumble upon a man possessed with demonic energy who wields the Holy Sword. Alford shows up in search of his sword and winds up helping Yuri and the others retrieve it.

title: The Shadow Begins to Move
overview: A mysterious masked man with hypnotizing powers walks into King Belar's castle unhindered leaving us with many questions yet to be answered. Back in the Demon Kingdom Yuri is holding a party for the Alliance members.

title: The Creature from the Darkness
overview: Yuri is captured along with Wolfram and taken to Big Cimarion in order to be handed over to a hypnotized King Belar. Their transport is attacked by bandits who are led by a familiar face.

title: The King of Chaos
overview: Yuri decides to confront King Belar and try to convince him to stop fighting. He goes off with his crew and Adalbert in tow towards the King's Castle.

title: Demons, to Earth
overview: Ulrike reveals that the final forbidden box is on Earth. Yuri, along with Murata, Wolfram, Conrad and Gwendal set off to locate and bring the box back to The Demon Kingdom.

title: Big Brother's Anguish
overview: Yuri takes the group on a sightseeing trip while waiting for Bob, the Maou of the Earth to contact them. Shori meets up with Rodriguez, who ask a favour from him.

title: Another Demon King
overview: Yuri and co. travel to Switzerland after discovering that Bob is currently staying there. Yuri is shocked when he finds his parents followed him there and they travel together to meet Bob on a bus that was sent to fetch them.

title: Entrusted Hope
overview: Yuri and Bob battle with magic and Yuri wins. Bob decides to entrust the final forbidden box to Yuri.

title: Showdown! The Demon King vs. the Boney Corps
overview: The Kohi and many animals are acting up due to the fear of all of the forbidden box's are gathered together. Yuri manages to gain their trust and calms them.

title: The Return of Snow Günter
overview: Günter is poisoned again and Suzanna Julia's retired father visits the Demon Kingdom to release him and him and Yuri talk of Julia. But then, Günter's body unexpectedly moves on its own.

title: The Travelers Through the Snow
overview: It seems that one of the maids has been affected by miasma, a disease that makes the person unable to trust anyone. Yuri, Wolfram, Jozak and Conrad must obtain a rare herb on a mountain to cure the maid but how will they succeed if they are affected by it too?

title: The Power of Feelings
overview: Yuri along with Conrad, Murata, and Wolfram travel back to earth in order to get something Yuri left behind. They are unable to return to their world because of the box removed from Earth and they travel to Switzerland where Bob is to ask for assistance.

title: A Bridge to Tomorrow
overview: Human villagers decide to build a bridge between the land of humans and the Mazoku. But they are being attacked by mysterious light wolves believed to be the ghosts of the war 20 years ago.

title: The Age of Glory
overview: Günter teaches Yuri about the past of The Great Demon Kingdom. The founding king Shinou, the Great Sage as well as the four families with the keys to the boxes are shown. Afterwards, Wolfram seems to be acting strangely.

title: What Must Be Protected
overview: Shori goes to The Great Demon Kingdom by accident after the lake in Switzerland pulls him in. He asks Yuri to stop the ceremony of the forbidden boxes and questions the Original King's decisions.

title: The Forgotten People
overview: A possessed Wolfram offers to give Shori magical power to protect Yuri but before Shori can answer, an unexpected visitor arrives interrupting the conversation.

title: Big Brother's Big Rampage
overview: Shori can now manipulate water and practices. Miko attempts to go to her sons in scuba diving equipment and ends up dragging her husband into freediving. While practicing, Shori loses some control.

title: That Which Is Sealed
overview: Yuri forgives Shori for his misdeed and consoles him by telling his admiration for him to use maryoku and recover so quickly.

title: Dark Pulsation
overview: Yuri starts the ceremony but Wolfram suddenly attacks Yuri, distracting Yuri into messing up the ceremony. A dark figure appears and takes Conrad's left arm.

title: The Controller of the Truth
overview: Shinou praises his handpicked strategist and Wolfram is taken to Blood Pledge and Greta wonders if he had died. Anissina speculates that Wolfram still is alive and plans to freeze his body like Günter's when he was poisoned.

title: The Sun and the Moon
overview: Yuri and co. head back to The Original King's Temple to retrieve the keys from The Original King. However, they are attacked by Soushu's army of dolls when they enter.

title: Within the Darkness
overview: Soushu enters Yuri's body to take it over from the inside. Conrad, Gwendal, Jozak, Hube and Günter awaken outside the temple and return to the castle, where Wolfram had been revived with his heartbeat returned to him.

title: The Advent of the Demon King
overview: Soushu has successfully taken over Yuri's heart by revealing why he chose him as the Maou—to be his body. Meanwhile, Günter and Dorcacos travel to Morgif's birthplace in order for him to reveal his true powers.

title: Till the Day We Meet Again
overview: Soushu is forced out of Yuri's heart and Yuri defeats him, causing Soushu's troops to disappear as well as Shinou's soul together with him who thanks him. Murata told Yuri that they can not travel again to the other world because Shinou had disappeared.

title: Return of the Demon King
overview: Yuri and Murata return to The Demon Kingdom. Günter is preparing for the Maou's 16th birthday where Yuri will determine his path as an adult, Wolfram is on his way back from the Bielefelt lands. It turns out that while Yuri was away, the Ten Noble Family had chosen a new Maoh, which turns out to be Wolfram!

title: A Demon King's Qualifications
overview: Yuri goes through with the ceremony and soon finds himself in The Original King's temple where he has to make the final decision. He meets The Original King himself, who tells Yuri that he will eliminate anyone who dares oppose Yuri being king.

title: The Demon King's Decision
overview: After Yuri's decision is final, Wolfram brakes off the engagement in order to avoid any conflict and returns to the Bielefelt lands. Yuri pursues him and they have a duel. Yuri then uses his powers to defend himself and Wolfram, and to prove he is worthy of being king.

title: Greta and Yuram
overview: When merchants come to The Demon Kingdom's capital to sell miniature bearbees, the whole town is turned upside down. Greta convinces Yuri and Wolfram to buy her one, but the merchants give her one piece of advice: never get her bearbee soaked in water. They soon discover why.

title: Lyla's Wedding
overview: During one of his study sessions, Yuri receives an invitation to attend Lyla and king Antoine Jean Le Pierre's wedding. However, the king announces that the special sword of his country, the one needed for them to get married, had gone missing. Yuri promises to find the lost sword.

title: Infiltration! Big Cimaron
overview: Murata, Jozak and Conrad travel to Big Shimaron to obtain something that Murata had left behind without Yuri's knowledge. Yuri and Wolfram find out and follow them in Celi's ship.

title: Night of the Banquet
overview: Yuri and Wolfram attends a banquet disguised as girls. It is there where Yuri meets Saralegi for the first time. Yuri was exposed while Wolfram escaped with Adalbert's help.

title: The Captive Demon King
overview: Murata, Jozak and Conrad infiltrate the castle and manage to find a box full of swords. When an intruder alarm is sounded, Murata discovers it was not them that had been found.

title: Black Geneus
overview: Lanzhil, in order to get rid of both Conrad and Yuri, orders Conrad to execute Yuri to prove his loyalty to Big Shimaron, knowing that he would not do it.

title: Conrad and Günter
overview: Yuri and co. visits the academy where Conrad trained to become a soldier.

title: The Bride Is Anissina?!
overview: It turns out that Anissina's brother has set her up with a suitor for her to marry.

title: The Hero and the Three Swords
overview: Yuri, while visiting Caloria, was attacked by members of the White Crow but fortunately was saved by Al while Wolfram and Conrad were busy fighting.

title: King Saralegi of Small Cimaron
overview: While trying to obtain the swords, Yuri and co. were tricked and attacked by the White Crows.

title: Moon Reflected in Water
overview: Yuri, Conrad, Wolfram and Murata returns to Earth so that Yuri is able to take his final exam.

title: Lullaby of the Wind
overview: Greta's past is revealed.

title: The Wincott Legacy
overview: An old invention that was created a long time ago is found.

title: Invitation to Small Cimaron
overview: Sara invites Yuri to Small Shimaron to make an alliance with The Great Demon Kingdom. They were attacked while having a discussion.

title: Two Kings
overview: Yuri and Sara returns to the latter's castle where Yuri meets Sara's trusted subordinate, Gerard.

title: The King's Guardian
overview: Sara is captured while Yuri manages to escape with the help of his subjects but Yuri is determined to go back and save Sara.

title: For the Sake of a Friend
overview: Big Shimaron has crossed over to Small Shimaron to capture Yuri.

title: Bitter Farewell
overview: It is revealed that Berias is the one who shot the arrow under the orders of Sara so that he can gain Yuri's trust.

title: The People of the Round Table
overview: After Yuri went to Small Cimaron, the heads of the ten noble families summons him to a meeting around the round table to know his motives. However, the meeting is shortened when Yuri decides to play a game of "Shinoued Away" with them.

title: El's Abduction
overview: Just as Yuri and Murata are about to head for The Great Demon Kingdom, Shori surprises them as he jumps in with them and ends up pulling them further away than they planned.

title: The Chosen One
overview: Shori chases the White Crows and manages to rescue El by using magic.

title: Prairie Pursuit
overview: As Jeneus is about to escape with Shori through a ship, Yuri and co. arrives and attempts to stop him.

title: White Crows
overview: Murata informs everyone that his memories of his past life has been transferred to Jeneus and that Jeneus is just a copy of the real person from the past.

title: Divine Sword
overview: Alazon explains the history of Seisakoku to Shori while Yuri and co. takes refuge at a hideout prepared for them.

title: Invocation
overview: Shori follows Alazon and unleashes the power of the sword on Big Shimaron's army which had come to destroy the White Crows.

title: Beyond Feelings
overview: The Ten Nobles gathered together to have a meeting and questioned Yuri's motive to travel to Big Shimaron. They were suspicious of Shori and placed him under house arrest for associating with the enemy.

title: Outbreak of War
overview: Big Shimaron is approaching faster than everybody thought and Waltorana's troops has been mobilized. When Yuri, Murata and Shori attempt to get to Lanzhil's ship, they overshoot and arrive on Sara's ship instead.

title: I Resign as Demon King
overview: Murata and Shori stops Yuri by pushing him overboard, sending him back to Earth along with Shori while Murata is transported to The Original King's Temple. When Yuri awakens, he finds himself unable to return to the other world.

title: The Blue Blowing Wind
overview: When Yuri comes back, he realizes that Conrad is still in Big Shimaron and Wolfram has gone to fetch him back.

title: Unexpected Reunion
overview: Yuri sends a letter to Sara, informing him on the capture of Beria and inviting him to The Great Demon Kingdom to get him back.

title: Holy Kingdom
overview: Berias explains the past of Seisakoku to Sara.

title: Unfulfilled Promise
overview: Jeneus attacks The Great Demon Kingdom in order to see The Original King once again as his last wish. He sends monsters as decoys to The Great Demon Kingdom and travels over to The Original King's Temple.

title: True Power
overview: Yuri invites Alazon to Covenant Castle as an honored guest. He agrees to help Alazon to the exasperation of his subjects.

title: Sad Roar
overview: Sara appears in an alleyway with the Holy Sword lying next to him. When he takes out the sword, it leaves a faint trail on the ground. Sara follows it and finds Jeneus.

title: A Place to Go Home
overview: The Original King decides to disappear along with Jeneus but Yuri intervenes. After Yuri had lectured The Original King, they had let down their guard and Jeneus stabs The Original King.

title: Until We Meet Again...
overview: Everything has turned back to normal but anxiety hangs in the air as Yuri has not awaken. Sara appears, offering to help Yuri with the Holy Sword.
